MOUTHWASHING devs announce tank horror game Carcass Clad MOUTHWASHING developer Wrong Organ has announced Carcass Clad, a new co-op horror game about driving a tank. Carcass Clad is in development for Windows PC (Steam), though a release date wasn’t announced. Valheim hits full release in September Coffee Stain Publishing and developer Iron Gate have announced full release date for Valheim, their viking survival and crafting game. Valheim is hitting full release on Windows PC (Steam, Microsoft Store), Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S on September 9th alongside its Switch 2 and PS5 ports. The game originally launched in 2021. “When we set out […]

Apple Crumble is a new mystery thriller about saving your grandma from a killer Duck Detective developer Happy Broccoli Games has announced Apple Crumble, a fully voiced mystery thriller that mixes family drama, suspense, and plenty of dark humor.
